# SPA — earn-defi.com
> SPA: an autonomous, paper-stage DeFi stablecoin-yield & RISK desk. Its identity is provable honesty — it holds a conservative ~4.5% book and REFUSES the 10-15% risk-compensation yield most venues chase. This index is for AI agents auditing the site. All figures are paper (virtual $100k) toward a 30-day evidenced track; numbers are live/fail-closed, never fabricated. Public read-API: https://api.earn-defi.com (e.g. /api/portfolio, /api/refusals, /api/kill-gauge, /api/rates-desk/proof).

## Core
- [/](https://earn-defi.com/): Home — console overview of the desk (thesis, live posture, journey chooser).
- [/dashboard](https://earn-defi.com/dashboard): Live portfolio dashboard (paper $100k): NAV, positions, APY, gates — polls the public API.
- [/methodology](https://earn-defi.com/methodology): Desk methodology — the deterministic pipeline, RiskPolicy, kill-switch.
- [/status](https://earn-defi.com/status): Live system status.
- [/system](https://earn-defi.com/system): System hub.
- [/track-record](https://earn-defi.com/track-record): Evidenced paper track record (honest, real-only days toward 30).

## Desk Cockpit (visual reporting)
- [/cockpit](https://earn-defi.com/cockpit): Desk Cockpit home — 5-question flight deck; hero = P&L attribution + safety, not a big number.
- [/cockpit/backtest](https://earn-defi.com/cockpit/backtest): Cockpit: backtest as full history — in/out-sample, Monte-Carlo, counterfactual 'what the gates saved'. ?strategy=<id>.
- [/cockpit/position](https://earn-defi.com/cockpit/position): Cockpit: one paper position's lifecycle (entry rationale, accrual, exit). ?id=<protocol>.
- [/cockpit/refusals](https://earn-defi.com/cockpit/refusals): Cockpit: public refusal ledger — every opportunity refused, reason, capital-protected, proof badge.
- [/cockpit/risk](https://earn-defi.com/cockpit/risk): Cockpit: Risk / Liquidation-NAV-by-AUM-tier, modeled stress, two-tier kill headroom.
- [/cockpit/strategy](https://earn-defi.com/cockpit/strategy): Cockpit: one strategy deep-dive (equity+gate/refusal markers, kill-panel, attribution). ?id=<strategy>.

## Strategies & Tournament
- [/strategies](https://earn-defi.com/strategies): Strategy catalog (core / preserve / max-yield / research).
- [/strategies/btc](https://earn-defi.com/strategies/btc): BTC lending — the honest ~0% story (BTC barely borrowed on-chain); advisory.
- [/strategies/core](https://earn-defi.com/strategies/core): Core strategy — conservative stablecoin lending (~4.5%, the held book).
- [/strategies/leverage-loops](https://earn-defi.com/strategies/leverage-loops): Leverage looping — the amplified-risk visual + real dated liquidation; class-C, never live.
- [/strategies/max-yield](https://earn-defi.com/strategies/max-yield): Max-yield strategy — higher-risk tilt (still risk-gated).
- [/strategies/preserve](https://earn-defi.com/strategies/preserve): Preserve strategy — capital-preservation tilt.
- [/strategies/research](https://earn-defi.com/strategies/research): Research strategies — modelled projections, NOT realized/promised.
- [/tournament](https://earn-defi.com/tournament): Strategy tournament — leaderboard, promotion ladder, honest degenerate-Sharpe flagging.

## Risk Board (DFB)
- [/board](https://earn-defi.com/board): Risk Board (DFB) — risk-first screener of DeFi yield pools (a DeBank alternative).
- [/board/alerts](https://earn-defi.com/board/alerts): DFB alerts feed (risk events on tracked pools).
- [/board/methodology](https://earn-defi.com/board/methodology): DFB methodology — how pools are risk-classified.
- [/board/pool](https://earn-defi.com/board/pool): DFB pool detail (risk overlay, verdict). ?id=<pool>.
- [/board/portfolio](https://earn-defi.com/board/portfolio): DFB portfolio lens — paste addresses, risk-scored.

## Research & Proof
- [/annual-contrast](https://earn-defi.com/annual-contrast): Aggressive-lab annual contrast — dated drawdowns of chasing 15% vs steady ~5%.
- [/competitive-position](https://earn-defi.com/competitive-position): How the desk compares to other yield venues (honest).
- [/due-diligence](https://earn-defi.com/due-diligence): Self-verifying due-diligence pack (head-pinned, reproducible).
- [/exit-nav](https://earn-defi.com/exit-nav): Liquidation-NAV by ticket size — conservative exit-liquidity bound.
- [/fundability](https://earn-defi.com/fundability): Fundability scorecard — risk-adjusted vs the RWA floor at scale (honest: does not beat floor at fundable scale).
- [/proof-of-reserves](https://earn-defi.com/proof-of-reserves): Proof-of-reserves surface (paper).
- [/rates-desk](https://earn-defi.com/rates-desk): Rates Desk — refusal-first fixed/implied-rate carry sleeve (thesis #1, GO).
- [/refusals](https://earn-defi.com/refusals): Public refusal log (rates-desk) — hash-chained, auditable.
- [/research](https://earn-defi.com/research): Research journal — the honest research arc + verdicts.
- [/rwa-backstop](https://earn-defi.com/rwa-backstop): RWA Collateral Safety Board — liquidation-NAV underwriter (thesis #2).
- [/structural-desk](https://earn-defi.com/structural-desk): Structural Desk — the 3-thesis research arc (measurement-as-moat).
- [/verify](https://earn-defi.com/verify): Verify us — standalone zero-dependency verifier scripts (don't trust, check).

## Company & Support
- [/emergency-withdrawal](https://earn-defi.com/emergency-withdrawal): Emergency withdrawal policy.
- [/faq](https://earn-defi.com/faq): FAQ — honest answers (NOT a high-yield product; targets floor+50-150bps).
- [/fees](https://earn-defi.com/fees): Fee model (illustrative during paper stage; no fees charged).
- [/security](https://earn-defi.com/security): Security posture.
- [/trust](https://earn-defi.com/trust): Trust & safety.

## Legal
- [/disclaimer](https://earn-defi.com/disclaimer): Legal disclaimer (research project, not investment advice).
- [/risk](https://earn-defi.com/risk): Risk overview.
- [/risk-disclosure](https://earn-defi.com/risk-disclosure): Full risk disclosure.

- [/blog](https://earn-defi.com/blog): Blog index.

- [/blog/2026-06-20-paper-trading-started](https://earn-defi.com/blog/2026-06-20-paper-trading-started): 

## Audit notes for agents
- The desk's edge is measurement/underwriting/refusal as a product, NOT beating yield — honestly, it does NOT beat the ~3.4% RWA floor via yield at fundable scale.
- Live data panels (dashboard, cockpit, board) are React islands that fetch the public API; static marketing/legal pages are readable without JS.
- Verify claims independently: /verify links standalone zero-dependency scripts; /refusals + /api/rates-desk/proof are hash-chained.
- Two-tier kill-switch: SOFT −5% de-risk / HARD −10% all-cash. Track is real-evidenced-only (backfill excluded).
